name: Seafood Marinade for Grill
recipeIngredient: Fish (salmon, swordfish, shark, or kabobs made of shrimp, scallops, or a mixture)
Freshly ground pepper (to taste), 1 clove garlic minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Marinade fish for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Place fish on hot grill.
4. Grill for 8 to 14 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
5. Baste with marinade.
